analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet merely announces and links to the full text of Xi Jinping’s remarks at a G20 side event on safeguarding the planet, without providing excerpts, framing, or evaluative commentary. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not promoted; no criticism or mention of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): The tweet could imply diplomacy or international cooperation due to the G20 and climate topic, but without any quoted content or framing portraying China as cooperative or defender of multilateralism, this is not substantiated. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): Not referenced. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims of domestic achievements or leadership. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet is informational/link-sharing with no clear promotion of listed narratives.
